title: Rebuild app as animated parchment scroll letter

requirements.text: Rebuild the frontend to match the provided HTML design exactly: a dark (#121212) background entry screen with a parchment-styled 'Open My Heart ❤️' button (Cinzel font, gold border, rounded pill shape with hover scale/rotate effect). Clicking it hides the entry screen and reveals the scroll.
acceptanceCriteria: Entry screen shows only the 'Open My Heart ❤️' button centered on a #121212 background
Button uses Cinzel font, parchment (#f4e4bc) background, gold (#b89b5e) border, border-radius 50px
Hover state scales to 1.1 and rotates 2deg with white glow shadow
Clicking the button hides the entry screen and shows the scroll

requirements.text: Implement the animated parchment scroll UI: two wooden-style brown roll handles (gradient, rounded, with 🕯️ candle decorations at each end), and a parchment body between them that animates from height 0 to 75vh over 1.8s with a cubic-bezier easing when opened. The parchment uses background color #f4e4bc with a paper-fibers texture overlay, gold left/right borders, and inner shadow.
acceptanceCriteria: Two wooden roll handles appear above and below the parchment, each 45px tall with candle emoji decorations
Parchment animates open from height 0 to 75vh over 1.8s
Parchment background is #f4e4bc with paper-fibers texture from transparenttextures.com
Parchment has 4px solid #b89b5e borders on left and right
Scroll is max-width 650px, centered, 95% wide

requirements.text: Render the letter content inside the parchment scroll. The content fades in (opacity 0 to 1) after a 1.2s delay once the scroll is open. Content includes: Great Vibes font h1 title 'To My Most Special Person 🌹' in red (#d42424); six body paragraphs in Dancing Script at 1.4rem; a gold horizontal rule separator; a highlighted exam note section with class 'highlight' in bold red (#b52b2b) at 1.5rem; and a 'Roll Back & Close 📜' button that reverses the scroll animation and returns to the entry screen.

quotes: ✍️ A Note for Your Maths Exam ✍️

acceptanceCriteria: Letter content fades in with 1.2s opacity transition delayed 1.2s after open class is added
h1 uses Great Vibes font at 2.8rem in color #d42424
Body text uses Dancing Script at 1.4rem with line-height 1.7, color #2c1e16
All six paragraphs and exam note section are present with correct emoji and text
Gold horizontal rule separates love letter section from exam note section
Highlight paragraph is bold, #b52b2b, 1.5rem
'Roll Back & Close 📜' button collapses parchment over 1.8s then shows entry screen
On mobile (max-width 480px) content font-size is 1.2rem and h1 is 2.2rem

requirements.text: Load Google Fonts: Dancing Script (weight 600), Cinzel (weights 400 and 700), and Great Vibes from fonts.googleapis.com, and apply them consistently across all UI elements as in the provided design.
acceptanceCriteria: Dancing Script 600 is loaded and applied to body and letter content
Cinzel 400/700 is loaded and applied to buttons
Great Vibes is loaded and applied to the h1 heading

requirements.text: Set the page title to 'A Message for the Most Special Person ✨' and ensure the app is fully responsive with no horizontal overflow, using overflow-x: hidden on the body.

quotes: <title>A Message for the Most Special Person ✨</title>

acceptanceCriteria: Browser tab title reads 'A Message for the Most Special Person ✨'
No horizontal scrollbar appears at any viewport width
Layout centers correctly on both desktop and mobile

constraints: All letter content (paragraphs, exam note, emojis) must match the provided HTML exactly — do not alter the text
Do not add authentication or backend features
Font sources must be loaded from fonts.googleapis.com as specified
nonGoals: Any features beyond the provided HTML design
